source_wording.exact_independence_scope: These are FIVE methodologically distinct routes (R16 counterfactual-invariance, W206; R9 Dirac-BRST constraint cohomology, W207; R7 Lawvere/Cantor diagonal fixed point, W208; R12 topos internal logic, W209; R1 Helmholtz inverse-variational, W210) that UNANIMOUSLY (5/5) return the SAME verdict RESIDUAL-BIT-STANDS. Convergence is NOT independence: all five share the SAME load-bearing premises (the W203 Schur-forced ungraded eta / nulldim=1 guardrail; the good-stable stabilizer = C-commutant = maximal compact SO(9)xSO(5), which LIBERATES the invariant-form space from 1 to 2; the (6,4)-fiber geometric-positive / record-count-negative Krein split; the Cl(9,5)=M(64,H) rep-canonicity caveat; and the SAME single external Z/2 posit, the unbuilt interacting C-operator / C2-closing Y14-curvature spectral section) and each reduces to that one external datum, so their agreement is dependence-driven shared-premise convergence, NOT premise-independent evidential replication. The raw method count (5) is NOT an independence count. The independence the RESULT establishes is proof-theoretic (Godel) independence of the C-grading SIGN from GU's good-stable axioms: the sign is TRUE in the good model and FALSE in the pathological model of the SAME self-consistency theory (W208 bistability), so it is neither derivable nor refutable inside GU and must be posited or supplied by the external TI/time-as-finality datum. No evidential-independence type is asserted for the five methods; the raw method count is NOT an independence count.

classification.rationale: The receiver preserves the source's own typing at exactly source strength: what is independent is the RESULT (the C-operator grading sign is Godel-independent of GU's good-stable axioms), not the five methods from one another. All five methods share all five load-bearing premises and reduce to one external Z/2 posit (P-EXTERNAL-C-OPERATOR), so the five-method convergence is received as ONE dependence-driven convergence unit, never as five evidential units. This assessment neither strengthens nor weakens the source typing.

nonclaims: This assessment does not convert the five method rows into independent evidential units; the raw method count is not an independence count.
This assessment does not upgrade the source claim status (exploration) or any grade (EXACT/STRONG/STRUCTURAL/ARGUED, internal-tier verification only).

This assessment does not assert any GU/TI/TaF cross-repository identity; per the 2026-07-15 adapter-2 correction (ADAPTER2-01), the GU-sign-to-TaF-finality-axis-polarity identification is OPEN and the withdrawn identity is not reopened here.
This assessment does not select a value for the grading sign; bar(b), H59, Krein positivity, and physical issuance remain OPEN in their source repositories.
falsifiers: The copied source wording differs from the frozen GU-001 packet at packet_digest a3f7fc5d99f3810ad86b783365e130749d137e227e6ac97021c26a54a9fff1be.
